title: ripopt: A Memory-Safe Interior Point Optimizer in Rust
description: ripopt is a primal-dual interior point optimizer for nonlinear programming, written in Rust. It originated as a translation of Ipopt and has diverged with novel algorithmic features including an implicit slack formulation, two-phase Gauss-Newton/NLP restoration, automatic NE-to-LS reformulation, sIPOPT-style parametric sensitivity analysis, and a multi-solver fallback architecture. ripopt provides Rust, C, AMPL/NL, Pyomo, GAMS, and Julia/JuMP interfaces.
